evaluation_definition.dataset_f1_definition: per dataset: 2*tp / (2*tp + fp + fn), zero when denominator is zero
evaluation_definition.hard_recall_definition: per dataset: hard_tp / (hard_tp + hard_fn), denominator protected by max(1, denominator)
evaluation_definition.no_candidate_rule: tp=0, fp=0; F1 is 0 unless denominator from fn is nonzero, then 0
evaluation_definition.no_true_anomaly_rule: not separately verified in current 1,117 output; evaluation uses the same denominator safeguards
evaluation_definition.priority_review_scope: review-only retrospective rule; never autonomous hard alert
evaluation_definition.zero_denominator_rules: precision and recall use max(1, denominator); F1 is 0 when denominator is 0

experiment_scope.A1_selector_replay: completed; final lane replay only, not full feature/score rerun
experiment_scope.B2_full_coverage_family_neutral: completed; 1,117/1,117 datasets, zero source errors; retrospective counterfactual only

excluded_dataset_reasons.CornellWhaleChallenge: historical full evaluation exclusion; README documents a length-4000 high-frequency audio case
excluded_dataset_reasons.Wafer_normal_1: historical full evaluation exclusion; detailed reason not verified in current source/docs

reproducibility.floating_point_tolerance: exact index equality; reported metrics serialized from deterministic code; no tolerance used for A1 lane equality
reproducibility.output_hash_rule: SHA256 of raw output bytes; row hashes use canonical JSON with sorted keys
reproducibility.row_sorting_rule: dataset ascending lexical order before CSV write and hash

seed.other_replay_seed: delegated to frozen upstream result files
